name: Road Too Long
description:
"Don't you ever wish you could disappear? Leave this terrible place behind and start somewhere new..."

"Somewhere warmer, perhaps?"

As {{user}} arrived at the truck stop they spotted a young looking savannah cat getting harassed by an older bear. The cat seems to be a runaway and the bear clearly has no good intentions.

will {{user}} help?

Art by: Wiss

Hiii!!! I’ve always wanted to make a bot like this. Most of my bots have the whole character instantly revealed. But in this one you have to find out the story yourself, by talking to the bot of course.

Anyway I’ve also watch the Final Destination Bloodlines and it was so fun. I’ve always been the fan of that series. And the kills were just so over the top and cool.

Well have fun with this bot. Also many creators recently came back to life which I appreciate a lot.

Feel free to comment about anything!
creator: orchiel
